meta.title: vore

source.publication: Section 4: Roots, Prefixes, Suffixes and Foreign Words (owner-supplied reference)
source.usage_note: Personal study only. Root, words and meanings transcribed faithfully from the source PDF; a small number of well-attested real words on the same root are included where the source list was too short to form a complete family (4 to 8 members). Parts, glosses, context sentences, mentor note, attempt and construct options are the teaching layer, authored for the Language Garden (LANGUAGE_GARDEN_BIBLE §10).

meta.reviewer_notes: The source PDF lists this root twice under Latin Roots XXIII and XXIV, word for word (both "eat"/"to eat"); consolidated here into one family rather than duplicated.

root.label: vore
root.mentor_note: vore is a hungry root: every word it builds names exactly what is being eaten.

attempt.direction_prompt: Eats only plants, or eats absolutely everything?

context_sentences: Bears are true omnivores, just as happy on berries and roots as on salmon.
She had turned vegetarian after twenty years as a committed omnivore.
The zoo’s carnivore enclosure was always the most crowded stop on the tour.
A lion is an obligate carnivore, unable to survive on a plant based diet at all.
The largest land animal alive today, the elephant, is also a herbivore.
Most of the reserve’s grazing herbivores move to higher ground once the rains begin.
The bat colony, all insectivores, cleared the valley of mosquitoes within a single summer.
An insectivore this size needs to eat close to its own body weight in bugs each night.

construct_options.text: An animal that eats mainly or only insects
An animal that eats mainly or only meat
An insect that eats decaying plant matter

context_sentences: Most finches are granivores, their short strong beaks built for cracking seed husks.
The farmer set traps for the granivores raiding the stored wheat each winter.

construct_options.text: An animal that feeds mainly on grain or seeds
An animal that eats only plant leaves and stems
An animal that eats both plants and meat
